emails.subject: Access to trade
emails.body: Access to trade Doug, In order for us to set up Seung-Taek to trade online, we need a list of products which he will be managing. Thank you, Melba 58986

emails.subject: RE: Access to trade
emails.body: RE: Access to trade Doug, We just need your authorization to set him up in the system. Please disregard previous message regarding products. Thanks, Melba 58986

emails.subject: RE: Access to trade
emails.body: RE: Access to trade bal. day fin

emails.subject: RE: Access to trade
emails.body: please authorize seung-taek oh to manage the bal day fin products. thanks, doug
